expected revenue

## Main result

auction yields the highest expected revenue under standard assumptions

## What they prove

auctions are preferable to negotiations for selling a company

## What they only simulate

negotiation strategies

## What they do NOT test

cost of failed negotiation

## What we need to reproduce

results for different auction mechanisms

## How our project differs

assumes optimal seller strategy
